meaning: Officers' Training School(美国空军)军官训练学校
examples: Show results of off-the-shelf (OTS) software evaluations.
But under the new proposals only one agency, the OTS, will disappear.
We observed a clear reduction in OTS levels as the distance from a tobacco source increased.
But even with the OTS gone, banks will be able to shop for friendly charters.
The OTS also supervised the two biggest banks to fail so far: IndyMac and Washington Mutual.
